name: lazy-memvid-client-init
description: MemoryStore uses lazy memvid client initialization via async _ensure_client() to defer import until first use, enabling tests to inject mock memvid module via sys.modules before instantiation

name: mock-external-sdk-tests
description: Test external SDKs (memvid) by injecting mock module into sys.modules before importing dependent code, avoiding ModuleNotFoundError when SDK is not installed

name: cognee-module-level-import-for-patching
description: CogneeMemory uses module-level 'import cognee' with try/except to enable pytest patch('horse_fish.memory.cognee_store.cognee'). Methods reference module-level cognee directly (not lazy imports) so patching works. Fallback chain: primary LLM fails → _configure(use_fallback=True) → retry cognify.

name: cognee-hardening-pattern
description: Cognee hardening: Use SearchType.GRAPH_COMPLETION in search(), dataset_name in add(), temporal_cognify=True in cognify(), and structured node_sets for run result ingestion
